mapper.sql: select a.id, a.title, a.summary, a.content_markdown, a.cover_image, a.category_id, c.name as category_name, a.publish_date, a.reading_time, a.status from article a left join category c on c.id = a.category_id
mapper.insert: insert into article (title, summary, content_markdown, cover_image, category_id, publish_date, reading_time, status) values (#{title}, #{summary}, #{contentMarkdown}, #{coverImage}, #{categoryId}, #{publishDate}, #{readingTime}, #{status})
mapper.update: update article set title = #{title}, summary = #{summary}, content_markdown = #{contentMarkdown}, cover_image = #{coverImage}, category_id = #{categoryId}, publish_date = #{publishDate}, reading_time = #{readingTime}, status = #{status} where id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from article where id in
#{articleId}
mapper.select: select tag_id from article_tag where article_id = #{articleId} order by tag_id
select t.name from tag t inner join article_tag at on at.tag_id = t.id where at.article_id = #{articleId} order by t.id
